posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

pages.title: Curriculum Vitae
pages.text: EducationUniversity of California, Los Angeles (September, 2021 - Now)I’m currently pursuing my Ph.D. degree under the supervision of Professor Aydogan Ozcan. My research primarily focuses on computational imaging and optical neural networks. Zhejiang University (September, 2017 - June, 2021)I received a BE degree in Optical Science and Engineering with a Honors Degrees from Chu Kochen Honors College of Zhejiang University. There I did researches in optical super resolution imaging such as STimulated Emission Depletion microscopy (STED) and SAturated Competition microscopy (SAC). Ningbo Xiaoshi High School (September, 2014 - June, 2021)I graduated from Ningbo Xiaoshi High School, a prestigious school located in Ningbo, Zhejiang Province, China. Established in 1912, the school has fostered the growth of nearly 20 members of the Chinese Academy of Sciences and Engineering throughout its rich history. Tu Youyou, the first Chinese Nobel Prize laureate in Physiology or Medicine, also graduate from here. Publications Bai, B.+, Li, Y.+, Luo, Y.+, Li, X., Çetintaş, E., Jarrahi, M. and Ozcan, A., 2023. SPIE. *: Presenter AwardsUniversity of California, Los Angeles (September 2019 - Now)I was awarded the Department Fellowship to pursue my Ph.D. degree at UCLA. Zhejiang University (September 2017 - June 2021)I was awarded the First-Class Scholarship for Outstanding Merits of Zhejiang University, and Guoguang First-Class Scholarship for three years. I was awarded National Second-Level athlete in table tennis
